title: LedgerLM — Title
description: Title slide: LedgerLM System Architecture & TARA Security Evidence for Bosch CS Review

title: Application Overview
description: What is LedgerLM: multi-tenant AI financial platform, active tenants, hosting platform, security posture

title: High-Level Architecture
description: Full system architecture diagram: users, Azure App Service, Nginx, Node.js, Python, and all Azure services

title: Application Backends
description: Node.js/Express (port 5000) and Python/FastAPI (port 8000) component responsibilities and stack

title: Azure Services
description: PostgreSQL, Azure OpenAI, Key Vault, Blob Storage, Azure AD/Entra ID, ACR and Anaplan

title: AI Query Flow
description: 5-step data flow for AI financial queries: session auth, fast/AI path, semantic SQL, GPT-5.2 response

title: Document Ingestion Pipeline
description: 5-step pipeline: Azure Blob → Python parser → vector embeddings → PostgreSQL → available for queries

title: Authentication Flow
description: OTP passwordless flow and Azure AD SSO/OIDC flow with session cookie flags and rate limiting

title: Network Architecture & Multi-Tenancy
description: Azure network topology and logical tenant isolation by domain_id with isolation guarantees

title: Deployment & Technology Stack
description: CI/CD pipeline from Replit through GitHub to ACR to Azure App Service, plus full technology stack table

title: TARA Security Summary
description: Summary table of all 19 TARA requirements by category: 18 implemented, 1 partial, 0 pending

title: Authentication & RBAC Controls
description: SR-AUTH-01 through SR-AUTHZ-01: session middleware, OTP bcrypt, rate limiting, RBAC middleware with code evidence

title: Data Protection
description: SR-DATA-01/02/03: TLS in transit, AES-256 at rest, Azure Key Vault secret management with startup enforcement

title: Input Security & Session Management
description: SR-INPUT-01/02/03 and SR-SESSION-01: SQL injection, XSS, clickjacking prevention and secure cookie configuration

title: Network Security & Audit Logging
description: SR-NET-01/02 CORS control and DB SSL, SR-AUDIT-01 Pino structured logging with query audit table

title: Gaps & Remediation Plan
description: 4 known gaps: SSL cert verification, account lockout, global rate limiting, CSRF tokens with timelines

title: Security Test Cases
description: 9 passing security test cases: TC-AUTH, TC-AUTHZ, TC-INPUT, TC-SESSION, TC-NET, TC-AUDIT

title: Policy Compliance & Summary
description: Bosch policy compliance table, 95% TARA posture, closing summary and contact information
